data/maps/MauvilleCity_House1/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House1_Text_TakeHMRockSmash: Woohoo, your POKéMON look pretty\nstrong.\pI like that!\nHere, take this HM!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House1/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House1_Text_ExplainRockSmas: That HM contains ROCK SMASH.\pIf you come across large boulders\nthat block your path...\pWell, use that HM move and smash\nit right out of your way!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House1/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House1_Text_MonCanFlyOutOfS: Oh, yes, if you smash a rock, a POKéMON\ncould come flying out.
